# column2Alignment

**Instance Property**

The alignment of the text in the second column.

## Declaration

```swift
var column2Alignment: CLKComplicationColumnAlignment { get set }
```

## Discussion

This alignment value applies to the text in column two of both rows. It doesn’t apply to the text in the header line.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerImageProvider**: An optional image to display in the header.
- **headerTextProvider**: The text to display in the header line.
- **row1Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the first row.
- **row1Column2TextProvider**: The text to display in the second column of the first row.
- **row2Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the second row.
- **row2Column2TextProvider**: The text to display in the second column of the second row.
